data.description: Export your profile data or import new transactions from a CSV file.
data.dangerWarning: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. Please proceed with caution.
data.resetWarning: This will delete all transactions, invoices, and budgets for the current profile.
data.resetConfirm:
Are you absolutely sure?

This will permanently delete ALL transactions, invoices, and budgets for the "{profileName}" profile. Categories will not be affected.

This action cannot be undone.

installGuide.title: How to Install {appName}
installGuide.step1_chrome: Look for the Install icon in the address bar at the top right of your browser.
installGuide.step2_chrome: Click the icon and then click the 'Install' button in the prompt.
installGuide.step3_desktop: The app will now be available on your Desktop and in your Start Menu (Windows) or Launchpad (macOS).
installGuide.step1_safari: Tap the 'Share' button in the Safari toolbar.
installGuide.step2_safari: Scroll down and tap 'Add to Home Screen'.
installGuide.step3_safari: Confirm the name and tap 'Add'. The app icon will now appear on your Home Screen.
installGuide.step1_android: Tap the three-dots menu icon in the top right corner of Chrome.
installGuide.step2_android: Tap 'Install app' or 'Add to Home screen' from the menu.
installGuide.step3_android: Follow the on-screen prompts to add the app to your home screen.

import.title: Import Transactions from CSV
import.instructionsBody: Your CSV file must have a header row with the following columns: date, description, amount, type, category. The 'type' must be either 'Income' or 'Expense'.
import.errorHeaders: CSV file is missing required headers: date, description, amount, type, category.
import.errorAmount: Invalid amount on line {line}. Please provide a valid number.
import.errorType: Invalid type on line {line}. Must be 'Income' or 'Expense'.
import.errorDate: Invalid date format on line {line}. Please use YYYY-MM-DD.
